question: Separation of duties
canonical_answer: This scenario describes separation of duties—not allowing the same person to hold two roles that, when combined, are sensitive. While two-person control is a similar concept, it does not apply in this case because the scenario does not say that either action requires the concurrence of two users.

appears_in.title: 12 Principles Of Information Security
appears_in.answer: The practice of requiring that processes should be divided between two or more individuals; no one person in an organization should have the ability to control or close down a security activity
